text: {"claims":[{"statement":"The Nation is a newspaper published in Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"_The Nation_","entailment":"The listed item under Newspapers published in Lagos includes The Nation, indicating it is a newspaper in Lagos.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Business Day is a newspaper published in Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"_Business Day_","entailment":"The list of Newspapers published in Lagos contains Business Day, showing it is a newspaper in Lagos.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Lagos Television is a television station in Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Lagos Television","entailment":"The Television section lists Lagos Television, indicating it is a TV station in Lagos.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"88.9 FM (Brila FM) is a radio station in Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[88.9 FM](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brila_FM \"Brila FM\")","entailment":"The Radio list includes 88.9 FM with a link to Brila FM, showing it is a Lagos radio station.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Arik Air is a transportation company operating in Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Arik Air","entailment":"The Transportation section lists Arik Air, indicating it operates in Lagos.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
